item.title: Release v0.12.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added foreign-file import
  • Extended plugin system
  • Added pre-frame startup progress renderer

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Fixed issue with build dependencies in publish step
  • Potential fix blinking windows
  • Added support for older versions of glibc

💼 Other

  • Updated dependencies

🚜 Refactor

  • Refactored code structure

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.11.0

item.title: Release v0.11.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Revamped lua engine

📚 Documentation

  • Clarification on overwrite rules for --init-plugin
  • Added yet another clarification to overwrite rule in README.md

🎨 Styling

  • Added icons
  • Added new banner

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.10.0
  • Added gitigore

item.title: Release v0.10.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Revamped toast
  • Added compound matrix mode
  • Added dynamic layout
  • Revamped multichart expressions
  • Added support for named derived series in multichart
  • Added clickable multichart
  • Added additional math ops to multichart
  • Added rolling stats funcs to multichart
  • Added top level transform functions to mchart
  • Added seek-page command
  • Added chart preview interaction
  • Added Chart interactivity UX
  • Added boxplot viewmode to multichart
  • Added reorder actions for multichart

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed potential UTF8 issues and alignment of scatter points in mchart
  • Consolidated commands and help registry
  • Fixed seek command for matrix with mutli dims
  • Fixed multichart dependency resolution
  • Added missign colors and adjusted light mode colosr
  • Fixed panning on preview charts
  • Fixed scrolling of attributes view

💼 Other

  • Cleaned up some old code

🚜 Refactor

  • Improved structure of mchart
  • Put mchart functions into registry resolution

📚 Documentation

  • Added updated help section for mchart
  • Updated docs

⚡ Performance

  • Added drainage and coalscing of big dataset refinement and rednering in multichart mode
  • Backgrounded all heavy chart rendering work

🎨 Styling

  • Changed mchart styling to be more alligned with main view
  • Upgraded help styling

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.9.0

item.title: Release v0.9.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added heatmap
  • Added configurability for heatmap
  • Added keymaps configurability
  • Revamped multichart internals and expressions
  • Added profile plot to heatmap

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed potential issue for windows compilation
  • Fixed issues related to NaN values
  • Fixed update checker
  • Fixed mchart expression suggestion highlighting
  • Fixed issue with mchart dependency resolution when used in (x,y) series
  • Cargo clippy
  • Fixed plot UX on multichart

💼 Other

  • Added multichart configurations

🚜 Refactor

  • Restructured and extracted code
  • Further improvements to structure and code extraction

📚 Documentation

  • Updated homebrew install doc
  • Updated docs with heatmap and more
  • Updated keymaps docs
  • Updated customization docs
  • Updated multi chart docs
  • Added note about editing of series in mchart
  • Added docs about fixed multichart ux
  • Added better help panel for heatmap and multichart

⚡ Performance

  • Improved image rendering performance
  • Rendering of enormous datasets in multichart

🎨 Styling

  • Added unix uid-gid name resolution
  • Updated help section
  • Clippy fix

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.8.2
  • Made python scripts executable

item.title: Release v0.8.2
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed issue with loading bash profiles on edits
  • (cicd) Reinit the rustup

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.8.0

item.title: Release v0.8.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added configuration with colors via lua
  • Added symbols configuration
  • Added configurable order of display modes

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed search and seek issue
  • Fixed issue with mid query removes
  • Update LuaLS support strategy
  • Fixed highlighted issue when not in focus
  • Added a few missing color styled texts
  • (cicd) Fixed macro crate publish issues
  • (cicd) Fixed issue with sed replacement
  • (cicd) Fixed windows wix issues
  • (docs) Fixed wrong link for oranda

🚜 Refactor

  • Improved code structure
  • Improved commands and mchart structure
  • Improved color resolution structure

📚 Documentation

  • Added documentation about configuration and configs
  • Updated docs
  • Added light mode to docs

🎨 Styling

  • Fixed clippy
  • Cargo clippy fix

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.7.1
  • Update package manager manifests for v0.8.0

item.title: Release v0.7.1
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed issue with crates.io publish

📚 Documentation

  • Updated docs

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.7.0

item.title: Release v0.7.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added support for opaque types
  • Added compatibility mode

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed versioning in released binaries
  • Fixed rendering issues for varlen strings in compound types

🎨 Styling

  • Changed symbols
  • Added matrix symbol

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.6.0

item.title: Release v0.6.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added enum symbol and color overrides
  • Seperated meta info into Properties and Attributes

📚 Documentation

  • Added download example file in readme

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.5.3

item.title: Release v0.5.3
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Added compatibility mode on non-real tty terminals

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.5.2

item.title: Release v0.5.2
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed changelogs resolution for docs
  • Fixed installer script for windows
  • Fixed installers not to use first path
  • Fixed image capabilities on windows terminal
  • Deduplicated windows tab keypress
  • Fixed cursor blinks on windows terminal
  • Soften clipboard initialization failures
  • Added better support for non-graphical terminfos

📚 Documentation

  • Added description and image of the parametric multi plot option

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.5.1

item.title: Release v0.5.1
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Fixed web deploy
  • Made tmp link files unique

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.5.0

item.title: Release v0.5.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added mchart as group preview
  • Added file content preview

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed rendering issues on less common dataset tupes
  • Fixed command mode not appearing in multichart
  • Fixed scalar vs. series evalation in multichart
  • Fixed double click to expand groups
  • Fixed copying of system attributes
  • Removed previw option from array of strings
  • Fixed install script for better compatibility
  • (cicd) Fixed docs deploy to gh-pages
  • (cicd) Fixed msi installer issue

💼 Other

  • Added msi installer artifact
  • Added example data
  • Removed output file

📚 Documentation

  • Added oranda docs
  • Updated banner

🎨 Styling

  • Improved rendering of empty groups
  • Improved radargram viewport

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update package manager manifests for v0.4.4

item.title: Release v0.4.4
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed release commit race condition
  • Improved no file given error msg
  • (cicd) Introduced cargo-dist as distribution tool

💼 Other

  • Added wxs for windows ini
  • Fixed oranda builds
  • Improvements to deploy

📚 Documentation

  • Added initial docs site
  • Alligned prefered install

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Update Scoop manifest for v0.4.3
  • Added docs artifacts to gitignore

item.title: Release v0.4.3
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Removed macos x86_x64 artifact

item.title: Release v0.4.2
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Removed old macos

item.title: Release v0.4.1
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Added AUR distribution
  • (cicd) Fixed release.yml
  • (cicd) Moved secrets usage to step stage
  • (cicd) Removed secrets check

📚 Documentation

  • Updated readme

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Added installers

item.title: Release v0.4.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added simple mouse interactivity
  • Added clickable content rows
  • Added edit dataset content
  • Revamped commands feature
  • Improved multichart feature
  • Added custom derived series from expressions to multichart
  • Added absolute path multichart expression
  • Added commands for multichart
  • Added press command for escape hatch scripting
  • Added mouse interactivity to multichart
  • Added attribute actions
  • Added compound schema definition view

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Added enum attribute editing
  • Fixed edit fixed string attributes
  • Fixed rendering of compound attributes
  • Fixed rendering of compound arrays and references
  • Fixed jump to reference on click
  • Updated keymaps with Ctrl-U/D
  • Fixed bug related to goto on missing path
  • Fixed cross compatibility issues
  • (cicd) Fixed issue related to linux build
  • Hardened panic paths
  • Fixed issues related to big datasets

💼 Other

  • Avoided sh command execution
  • Updated release and packing

📚 Documentation

  • Added multichart and commands readme
  • Cleaned up docs
  • Updated docs

⚡ Performance

  • Improved edit flow

🎨 Styling

  • Added hyperlink styling on reference attributes

item.title: Release v0.3.0
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added toast warning
  • Added multi threaded image chart previews
  • Added enum support
  • Added support for compounds
  • Added more keymaps to help
  • Added windowing of large aspect ratio images
  • Added reload on file write

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed expand_toggle issue
  • Fixed edit on fixed string length attribute
  • Fixed attribute highlighting
  • Fixed error on empty dataset
  • Fixed navigation when stacked layout
  • Fixed issue with string render of one line

💼 Other

  • Removed old scripting code

🚜 Refactor

  • Refactored sprint attributes
  • Split h5f
  • Added codec abstraction
  • Keymaps + help

📚 Documentation

  • Updated docs for nav
  • Added reload keymap to README

⚡ Performance

  • Swapped out potential panic calls
  • Added debounce on previews

🎨 Styling

  • Cargo clippy fix

🧪 Testing

  • Updated script for code python script

item.title: Release v0.2.6
item.content:encoded:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • (cicd) Fixed dispatch script
  • (cicd) Fixed tag push permissions
  • (cicd) Fixed git tag push
  • (cicd) Fixed missing deps
  • (cicd) Slimmed syntect features
  • (cicd) Added fontconfig build deps
  • Reintroduced font fancy-default features
  • (cicd) Added unreleased changelogs flag
  • (cicd) Readded windows runner for cicd
  • Fixed cargo.toml typy
  • (cicd) Added build-test verify step
  • (cicd) Removed locked from cicd
  • (cicd) Changed windows archie to zip
  • (cicd) Removed archiving
  • (cicd) Readded sha release
  • Updated cargo.lock
  • (cicd) Added version to crates.io publish

💼 Other

  • (cicd) Add deployment workflow

item.title: Release 0.2.5
item.content:encoded:
🚀 Features

  • Added jumpto and inc dec commands
  • Added support for big ds with segmentatio
  • Added support for controling segment via cmd
  • Added structure for compounds/tables
  • Added support for scalar ds + cleanup
  • Enabled support for compressed data
  • Added escape to close command
  • Added changing x in preview
  • Added dim selection
  • Scoped row/col/x selection per node
  • Added image chart preview support
  • Added changing selected dim
  • Added softlink eval
  • Added support for changing dimension selector
  • Added support for highlighted strings
  • Added scroll on previews
  • Initial rhai structure
  • Added initial rhai types
  • Added operation evaluation
  • Added selection for script engine op eval
  • Added initial multichart feature
  • Added simple legend
  • Added link icon
  • Added clear multi chart selections
  • Improved searching draft
  • Added grayscale 12bit support
  • Added column scroll on text preview
  • Added mchart hint in treeview
  • Added zoom in multichart
  • Updated segment scroll to the sided
  • Updated tree view rendering on small areas
  • Added image preview counts
  • Added attributes browsing
  • Merged attribute improvements
  • Improved robustness
  • Temporary dir
  • Improved link root file name
  • Added selection and yank of content
  • Edit feature
  • Edit attributes
  • Added toast feature
  • Added extra matrix navigation
  • Fixed attribute view
  • Rubustified for no unwraps

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed git tag version into -v flag
  • Fixed string preview regression
  • Fixed overflow sub on pgdown matrix
  • Fixed dimension selector.
  • Fixed issue with showing matrix
  • Added exe perm to make scripts
  • Fixed render columns for line number
  • Improved size for y labels
  • Fixed link icon
  • Fixed issue with loading more on search
  • Fixed search issues
  • Fixed dep on git versioning for building
  • Fixed out of bounds
  • Bumped yanked dependency version
  • Fixed clipboard problems
  • Fixed deadlock on full NaN ds
  • Fixed broken link name
  • Fixed issue with matrix selection
  • Fixed editing deadlock
  • Fixed attribute view
  • Fixed issue with renaming attributes
  • Fixed issue with editors adding newline on edit
  • Fixed image pgdn and pgup
  • Fixed scroll past available img

💼 Other

  • Clippy fix
  • Bumped versin
  • Updated deps
  • Bumped version
  • Bumped path version
  • Progress editing attr name
  • Updated depencies
  • Removed chafa dep

🚜 Refactor

  • Moved std components and preview chart

📚 Documentation

  • Added readme docs for commands
  • Added a roadmap
  • Added todo
  • Updated readme roadmap
  • Updated doc
  • Removed a completed roadmap item
  • Updated readme
  • Updated readmes
  • Updated readme
  • Updated README
  • Updated readme3
  • Removed some todos that was already done
  • Updated readme
  • Updated readme roadmap

🎨 Styling

  • Clippy - renamed enum
  • Cleanedup unused imports
  • Imporved style removed old commented code
  • Removed unneccesary comment
  • Clippy fix

🧪 Testing

  • Added high dim h5 py
  • Testing new fuzzy searching

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • Added author
  • Added create big file script
  • Updated lock
